linapro-storage-qiniu.name: Object Storage - Qiniu Kodo
linapro-storage-qiniu.description: Provides a Qiniu Kodo backend for the host Storage domain capability.

settings.description: Enter your Qiniu Kodo access keys and bucket below. Enable only one cloud storage plugin at a time. If the configuration is incomplete, object storage operations will fail—the system will not automatically switch to local disk.
settings.accessKeyIdHelp: Qiniu AccessKey used by the provider SDK.
settings.secretAccessKeyHelp: Qiniu SecretKey. Leave empty to keep the previously saved value.
settings.secretAccessKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the saved secret
settings.regionHelp: Optional Kodo region ID (z0/z1/z2/cn-east-2/na0/as0). Leave empty to auto-detect from AccessKey and bucket.
settings.endpointHelp: Optional custom download domain for Get (CDN/custom domain). Management APIs do not require this field.
settings.pathPrefixHelp: Optional key prefix applied under the host-scoped object key.
